title: Dhammika to be aworn in today
body_lines: Business tycoon Dhammika Perera is to be sworn as an MP before Speaker Mahinda Yapa Abeywardana, Parliament sources said yesterday,
He is expected to be sworn in as the Supreme Court dismissed the petitions filed challenging his appointment as an MP.
He will be coming in as a national list MP in place of former Minister of Finance Basil Rajapaksa, who resigned from Parliament recently.
Mr, Perera is also expected to be given the ministerial portfolio of Investment Promotion. (Yohan Perera and Ajith Siriwardana)
